title: Smoky Croatian Dumplings
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring smoky pork and traditional Croatian dumplings.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the smoky pork shoulder and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the xtra garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the Croatian paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the pork to a baking dish and cover with foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes, or until the pork is tender.
Meanwhile, cook the dumplings according to package instructions.
To serve, place the cooked dumplings on a plate and top with the smoky pork and poppy seeds.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
